name: swarmx-monorepo
description: SwarmX multi-agent orchestration — Electron + Node.js edition

scripts.ci: pnpm test && pnpm -r build && uv sync --group inspect && pnpm test:inspect
scripts.eval:inspect: uv run --group inspect inspect eval evals/inspect/tasks.py@swarmx_smoke --model none
scripts.test:inspect: uv run --group inspect python -m unittest discover -s evals/inspect -p '*_test.py' && pnpm eval:inspect
